subject: BLOCK route: fix Slice A plural needs-attention text
body: Controller route after Fronded review: Slice A remains blocked before commit. Please add the smallest proof/fix for plural needs-attention summaries in your existing Slice A scope only. Fronded's specific examples: counts greater than one can render malformed text like '2 directed thread needs acknowledgement or routings', '2 identity routing collision needs coordinator attentions', or '2 agent route is stales'. Keep out of Nebulous controller/app-test files. Re-run focused Slice A proof and re-report as P8-A4 advanced at text/value-proxy level, not complete. Do not stage, enqueue, or open git/index until Pearly routes it after a fresh GO.
